message.content:
@startuml
title R19S84 KU1 - Knihovna

class Library {
  o books : ArrayList<Book>
  o persons : ArrayList<Person>
  o borrowings : ArrayList<Borrowing>
  o standardBorrowingPeriod : int
  o Library()
  + addBook(book : Book) : void
  + addPerson(person : Person) : void
  + addBorrowing(borrowing : Borrowing) : void
  + addBooks(books : ArrayList<Book>) : void
  + addPersons(persons : ArrayList<Person>) : void
  + addBorrowings(borrowings : ArrayList<Borrowing>) : void
  + getBooks() : ArrayList<Book>
  + getBookBorrowing(book : Book) : ArrayList<Borrowing>
  + getPersons() : ArrayList<Person>
  + getPersonBorrowings(person : Person) : ArrayList<Borrowing>
  + getPersonPenalties(person : Person) : ArrayList<Penalty>
  + penalisePerson(person : Person, penalty : Penalty) : void
  + getBorrowings() : ArrayList<Borrowing>
  + getAllBorrowingsThatAreOverdue() : ArrayList<Borrowing>
  + isBorrowingOverdue(borrowing : Borrowing) : boolean
  + extendBorrowing(borrowing : Borrowing) : void
  + returnBookAndEndBorrowing(borrowing : Borrowing) : void
  + borrowBookToPerson(person : Person, book : Book) : void
  o toString() : String
}

class Borrowing {
  o id : int
  o book : Book
  o person : Person
  o borrowed_since : DateTime
  o borrowed_until : DateTime
  o Borrowing(id : int, book : Book, person : Person, borrowed_since : DateTime, borrowed_until : DateTime)
  + getId() : int
  + getBook() : Book
  + getPerson() : Person
  + getBorrowedSince() : DateTime
  + getBorrowedUntil() : DateTime
  + setBorrowedUntil() : void
  o toString() : String
}

class DateTime {
  o daysInMonths : int[]
  o day : int
  o month : EMonth
  o year : int
  o hour : int
  o minute : int
  o seconds : int
  o DateTime(month : EMonth, year : int)
  o DateTime(int month, int year : int)
  o DateTime(day : int, month : EMonth, year : int, hours : int, minutes : int, seconds : int)
  o DateTime(day : int, month : int, year : int, hours : int, minutes : int, seconds : int)
  + getDay() : int
  + getMonth() : EMonth
  + getMonthI() : int
  + getYear() : int
  + getSeconds() : int
  + setDay(day : int) : void
  + setMonth(month : int) : void
  + setYear(year : int) : void
  + setMinutes(minutes : int) : void
  + setHour(hour : int) : void
  + setSeconds(seconds : int) : void
  + addDays(days : int) : void
  + getDateTimeInSecondsSince1970() : double
  o copy() : DateTime
  o toString() : String
}

enum EMonth {
  o JANUARY
  o FEBRUARY
  o MARCH
  o APRIL
  o MAY
  o JUNE
  o JULY
  o AUGUST
  o SEPTEMBER
  o OCTOBER
  o NOVEMBER
  o DECEMBER
  o getIntFromMonth(month : EMonth) : int «static»
  o getMonthFromInt(month : int) : EMonth «static»
}

class Book {
  o author : Person
  o title : String
  o publisher : String
  o isbn : String
  o Book(author : Person, title : String, publisher : String, isbn : String)
  + getAuthor() : Person
  + getTitle() : String
  + getPublisher() : String
  + getIsbn() : String
  o toString() : String
}

class Person {
  o name : String
  o surname : String
  o phone_numbers : ArrayList<Integer>
  o emails : ArrayList<String>
  o penalties : ArrayList<Penalty>
  o Person(name : String, surname : String)
  o Person(name : String, surname : String, phone_number : int, email : String)
  + getSurname() : String
  + getName() : String
  + getFullName() : String
  + getPhoneNumbers() : ArrayList<Integer>
  + getEmails() : ArrayList<String>
  + getPenalties() : ArrayList<Penalty>
  o toString() : String
  + setName(name : String) : void
  + setSurname(surname : String) : void
  o addPhoneNumber(phone_number : int) : void
  o addPhoneNumbers(phone_numbers : ArrayList<Integer>) : void
  o addEmail(email : String) : void
  o addEmails(emails : ArrayList<String>) : void
  o addPenalty(penalty : Penalty) : void
  o toString() : String
}

class Penalty {
  o description : String
  + getDescription() : String
  + Penalty(description : String)
  o toString() : String
}

class IDSingleton {
  o instance : IDSingleton «static»
  o IDCounter : int
  - IDSingleton()
  + getID() : int
  + getInstance() : IDSingleton «static»
  + getID() : int
}

Library "1" -- "*" Book
Library "1" -- "*" Person
Library "1" -- "*" Borrowing
Borrowing "*" -- "1" Book
Borrowing "*" -- "1" Person
DateTime -- EMonth
Person "1" -- "*" Penalty
Borrowing -- DateTime

@enduml
